homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features a solo acoustic guitar that plays with a simple, steady rhythm to create a calm and flowing atmosphere. The music maintains an introspective and thoughtful mood, offering a gentle backdrop suitable for quiet reflection or a reflective moment.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This is an energetic instrumental techno track featuring a driving drum machine beat and a pulsating bassline supported by prominent synthesizers. The infectious rhythm creates a high-energy atmosphere ideal for a nightclub or rave setting, aligning with the dance and trance styles found in the source album.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends a groovy, funky vibe with electronic elements to create a relaxed and steady rhythm. Driven by a repetitive bassline and supported by electric guitar and synthesizers, the music maintains a cool atmosphere ideal for background listening in a lounge or café setting.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental composition features a unique soundscape driven by chimes, bells, and layered percussive elements rather than a traditional beat. The interplay of these hits creates dynamic movement within a dark and mysterious mood that suggests the music is designed as an immersive game soundtrack. Recorded as electroacoustic improvisation involving a laptop and various objects, the piece evokes a sense of suspense through its experimental texture.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic and upbeat track features a male vocalist delivering romantic lyrics over a groovy bass line and steady drumming. The song blends elements of funk and rock with electric guitar and keyboard harmony, creating a mood perfect for a feel-good TV show or a romantic comedy soundtrack.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This intense piece exemplifies extreme metal through its relentless rhythm and chaotic blend of death and grindcore elements. Distorted electric guitars, aggressive bass lines, and fast acoustic drums drive the track with a heavy, violent energy that evokes scenes from a mosh pit or high-stakes action sequences.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental composition blends elements of jazz, blues, and rock to create a mellow, relaxing atmosphere with a touch of melancholy. A steady rhythm provided by bass guitar and drums supports a walking line that fits the slow tempo. The piece is well-suited for contemplative scenes in film or as background music during a late-night drive.

Lush strings support the slow, steady rhythm to create a calm and nostalgic atmosphere suitable for reflective scenes or exploration areas. The piece relies heavily on piano and synthesizer textures within a newage-inspired electronic framework.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
